name: Olivia Newton-John
abstract: Dame Olivia Newton-John (26 September 1948 – 8 August 2022) was a British and Australian singer, songwriter and actress. With over 100 million records sold, Newton-John is one of the best-selling music artists of all time, as well as the highest-selling female Australian recording artist of all time.

concerts.label: Australia Plays Broadway
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Harry Edison
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...But you take the singers now like, you know, Olivia Newton-John or Helen Reddy or -- I don't dig any of them.
